title: Fix matrix UX per centronias feedback

log.context: Fix matrix UX per centronias feedback

All changes made and pushed. Here is a summary of what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**CSS changes:**
- **Sticky column border**: Added `border-right: 2px solid #555` to `.persona-header` / `.persona-cell`, and a new `.stats-last` class with the same border applied to the last stats column (F column)
- **Zebra striping**: Added alternating row backgrounds using `nth-child(even/odd)` selectors, with sticky cells inheriting the same stripe color
- **Over-scroll padding**: ...(truncated)
